scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix services/user-service && npm run build --prefix services/question-service && npm run build --prefix services/matching-service && npm run build --prefix services/collaboration-service && npm run build --prefix shared/rabbitmq
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix frontend && npm run typecheck --prefix services/user-service && npm run typecheck --prefix services/question-service && npm run typecheck --prefix services/matching-service && npm run typecheck --prefix services/collaboration-service && npm run typecheck --prefix shared/rabbitmq
